api_key.description: Wufoo API key, sent as the HTTP Basic username (password is the literal 'pass'). Never logged.

base_url.description: Wufoo API base URL, e.g. https://<subdomain>.wufoo.com/api/v3. Defaults to a placeholder subdomain; override with your account's actual subdomain.

form_hash.description: Wufoo form hash to read entries for; required only for the entries stream, substituted into /forms/<form_hash>/entries.json.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to read; matches legacy's default of 1 page when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
